hero.markUnwatchedTooltip: Mark as unwatched - removes from watch history
hero.confirmUnwatchedBody: This will mark "{{title}}" as unwatched in your media server and remove it from your Aperture watch history.

insights.matchSubtitle: {{pct}}% match based on your viewing history
insights.subtitleMovie: How similar this movie is to movies you've enjoyed
insights.subtitleSeries: How similar this series is to series you've enjoyed
insights.tooltipDiscovery: How different this is from what you usually watch - helps you discover new things
insights.tooltipVariety: How much variety this adds to your recommendations
insights.whyWeThink: Why We Think You'll Like This
insights.basedOnHistoryMovie: Based on your history with similar movies:
insights.basedOnHistorySeries: Based on your history with similar series:

imageUpload.dropLabel: Drag & drop an image here, or click to browse
imageUpload.tooltipDefaultBadge: This is the default image set by admin

aiFunctionCard.toolCallingWarningTitle: This model doesn't support reliable tool calling.
aiFunctionCard.toolCallingWarningBody: The assistant will work but cannot search your library or make recommendations.
aiFunctionCard.toolCallingWarningOllama: For Ollama, use firefunction-v2 or qwen3 instead.
aiFunctionCard.embeddingUnsupported: This model doesn't support embeddings. Choose a different model.
aiFunctionCard.ollamaInstallTitle: Install models on your Ollama server
aiFunctionCard.baseUrlHelperOllama: Make sure Ollama is running and accessible at this URL
aiFunctionCard.addCustomDialog_ollama: Enter the exact model name as it appears on your Ollama server. You can find model names at ollama.com/library.
aiFunctionCard.addCustomDialog_openrouter: Enter the exact model name as it appears on your OpenRouter account. You can find model names at openrouter.ai/models (e.g., anthropic/claude-3.5-sonnet, openai/gpt-4o).
aiFunctionCard.addCustomDialog_huggingface: Enter the exact model name as it appears on Hugging Face Hub. You can find model names at huggingface.co/models (e.g., meta-llama/Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct, deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3-0324).
aiFunctionCard.addCustomDialog_compatible: Enter the exact model name as it appears on your OpenAI-compatible server.
aiFunctionCard.embeddingVectorTitle: Vector Dimension Must Match Model Output
aiFunctionCard.embeddingVectorBody: The embedding dimension you select must exactly match the number of dimensions your model outputs. If these don't match, embedding generation will fail or produce incorrect results.
aiFunctionCard.embeddingCommonDimensionsList:
384 — granite-embedding-30m-english, all-MiniLM-L6-v2
768 — nomic-embed-text, snowflake-arctic-embed-m, e5-base-v2
1024 — mxbai-embed-large, snowflake-arctic-embed-l, voyage-multilingual-2
1536 — OpenAI text-embedding-3-small, text-embedding-ada-002
3072 — OpenAI text-embedding-3-large
4096 — nv-embed-v2, larger custom models
aiFunctionCard.embeddingCheckDocs: Check your model's documentation to find the correct dimension.
aiFunctionCard.validatingModel: Validating model… This may take a moment{{ollamaSuffix}}

topPicksOutputConfig.accordionTitle: What's the difference between Library, Collection, and Playlist?
topPicksOutputConfig.libraryBody: Appears as a separate library in your media server sidebar. Contains virtual copies (STRM files) of the media. Best for dedicated browsing of Top Picks.
topPicksOutputConfig.collectionBody: Groups your existing library items into a "box set" that appears when browsing. Uses your original media files directly. Best for organization within existing libraries.
topPicksOutputConfig.playlistBody: Creates an ordered playlist in the Playlists section. Uses your original media files directly. Best for sequential watching or shuffle play.

studioDetail.emptyLibrary: No content found for {{name}} in your library.

search.title: Search
search.subtitle: Find movies and series using smart search with filters
search.placeholder: Search by title, actor, director, genre, keyword...
search.emptyTitle: Enter a search term to find content
search.emptyHint: Try searching for a movie title, actor name, director, genre, or keyword
search.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your filters or search terms

userSettings.profileSyncedCaption: Profile information above is synced from your media server.
userSettings.emailHelperCustom: You have set a custom email (not synced from Emby)
userSettings.emailHelperSynced: Synced from Emby Connect. Edit to override.
userSettings.emailNotificationsSubtitle: Receive email notifications about your recommendations
userSettings.aiLibraryNamesSubtitle: Customize how your AI recommendations libraries appear in your media server.
userSettings.libraryHelperNamedMovies: Your movies library will be named: "{{name}}"
userSettings.libraryHelperNamedSeries: Your series library will be named: "{{name}}"
userSettings.libraryHelperEmpty: Leave empty to use the global default template
userSettings.aiLibraryFooter: Changes will apply the next time the library sync jobs run or when recommendations are regenerated.
userSettings.aiExplanationSubtitle: Choose whether to include AI-generated explanations in your recommendation descriptions.
userSettings.aiExplanationIncludeBody: When enabled, each recommendation includes "Why Aperture picked this for you"
userSettings.aiExplanationFooter: Changes will apply when your recommendations are next regenerated.
userSettings.watchedRecsSubtitle: Choose whether to include content you've already watched in your AI recommendations.
userSettings.includeWatchedDesc: Recommendations may include movies and series you've already watched
userSettings.newContentOnlyDesc: Recommendations will only show content you haven't watched yet
userSettings.watchedRecsFooter: By default, recommendations only include new content. Enable this if you want rewatching suggestions.
userSettings.dislikedSubtitle: Choose how content you've rated 1-3 hearts should be handled in recommendations.
userSettings.excludeDislikedDesc: Content you dislike will never appear in recommendations
userSettings.penalizeDislikedDesc: Content you dislike will appear less often but may still show up occasionally
userSettings.dislikedFooter: Rate content with 1-3 hearts to mark it as disliked. Changes will apply when your recommendations are next regenerated.
userSettings.similarityGraphPrefsSubtitle: Customize how the similarity graph explores connections between movies and series.
userSettings.hideWatchedOn: Graph only shows unwatched content for new discoveries
userSettings.hideWatchedOff: Graph includes all similar content, even what you've already seen
userSettings.fullFranchiseOn: Show entire franchises without limits (e.g., all 26 James Bond films)
userSettings.fullFranchiseOff: Limit items per franchise to encourage diverse discoveries
userSettings.similarityGraphFooter: These preferences apply when exploring similar content on detail pages and in fullscreen graph view.
userSettings.traktSubtitle: Connect your Trakt account to sync your movie and TV show ratings.
userSettings.traktFooter: Syncing imports your Trakt ratings (1-10) as heart ratings in Aperture. Higher-rated content will have more influence on your recommendations.
userSettings.libraryNamesSaved: Library names saved! They will be used for future library updates.

algorithmSettings.weightSimilarityDesc: How much to prioritize content similar to what you've enjoyed
algorithmSettings.weightNoveltyDesc: How much to prioritize exploring new genres and styles
algorithmSettings.weightRatingDesc: How much to favor highly-rated content
algorithmSettings.weightDiversityDesc: How much variety to include in recommendations
